summary: ePaper refactoring verification complete. All 5 sub-components (EpaperPage.jsx, EpaperToolbar.jsx, NewspaperPage.jsx, PageThumbnail.jsx, PreviousEditions.jsx) render and function correctly. Push notification toast appears on home page with breaking news. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.

passed_tests: EpaperPage.jsx (155 lines) - main page renders with data-testid='epaper-page'
EpaperToolbar.jsx (67 lines) - all 10 elements render: AM/PM toggle, buttons, zoom, date picker, share, PDF
NewspaperPage.jsx (218 lines) - Masthead, InnerHeader, CmykFooter all visible
PageThumbnail.jsx (17 lines) - sidebar thumbnails render and clickable
PreviousEditions.jsx (122 lines) - 7 date cards + 'Older Editions' toggle working
AM/PM toggle - switches editions (PM: 3 pages, AM: 2 pages for 2026-03-05)
Date picker dropdown - shows editions with sun/moon icons and article counts
Page navigation - prev/next buttons work correctly
Sidebar thumbnail click - changes current page
Archive AM/PM buttons - clickable and load correct editions
GET /api/epaper/editions - returns editions with slot field (morning/evening)
Push notification toast - appears on home page after ~10 seconds with breaking news headline

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring is clean - components properly import each other via relative paths
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
Props are correctly passed between parent (EpaperPage) and child components
NewspaperPage contains Masthead, InnerHeader, CmykFooter as internal components (not exported)
PreviousEditions component handles recent dates and older editions grouping
Push notifications use Sonner toast library - working correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - 2026-03-05 has both morning (53 articles) and evening (67 articles)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ePaper page refactored from single 623-line file into 5 sub-components. All components render correctly with preserved functionality: AM/PM toggle, date picker with slot indicators, page navigation, sidebar thumbnails, archive section with AM/PM buttons. Push notifications verified - toast appears after ~10 seconds on home page with breaking news. Test date 2026-03-05 has both morning and evening editions available.

push_notification_verification.tested_toast_message: Breaking: LPG price hike: Domestic, commercial cylinders may become costlier from today...
